"'''The Brink'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story from ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4]]''.

==Plot summary==
While waiting for orders in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] locks on to a weak distress signal. Leaving without his [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]], permission, Anakin arrives at a seemingly abandoned [[Space station/Legends|space station]], known as the [[Brink of the Celestial Wake]]. While investigating inside, Anakin finds that all of the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] that were on the station are dead. Eventually, Anakin meets another [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], [[Serra Keto]]. She tells him that they need to leave, but Anakin insists that they press on. They are attacked by [[pink blob]]s with metal on their backs. Anakin strikes at them with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], yet they come back to life and start scurrying to another room. The two Jedi follow the pink blobs and find two huge [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]], made completely from the blobs. Thinking fast, Anakin uses [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to break open a hole in the wall, sucking out the spider droids, but also breaking apart the station. As the vacuum of space tears the station to pieces, Anakin attempts to activate the station's emergency [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shields]]. Keto quickly convinces Anakin not to, as the only hope for destroying the pink blobs is for the station to destroy itself, and them with it. Anakin refuses to give up so easily, however, and the two manage to escape just in time.
